title: The E-Waste Management Lifecycle (Oxford University Press Framework)
description: A flowchart illustrating the comprehensive lifecycle of electronic waste management as presented in Oxford University Press materials, highlighting key stages from production to responsible disposal.
relationships: Sequential flow from one element to the next, forming a cycle where recovered materials feed back into manufacturing
Feedback loops from 'Component Recovery' to 'Design & Manufacturing' to promote designing for recyclability (Eco-Design)
